categories.name: Homemade Appetizers
categories.description: Scratch-made starters to kick off your meal

items.name: Farmer's Market Bread
items.description: Fresh bakery baguette toasted with garlic butter, fresh tomatoes, parmesan, and blue cheese.

items.name: Shrimp Starters
items.description: Lighter portions of our shrimp favorites and a side of sauce. Crispy Fried, Coconut Fried, or Grilled (GF).

items.name: Peel-n-Eat Shrimp
items.description: Large, USA wild-caught pink Gulf shrimp steamed in the shell. Plain Hot or Chilled, Drunken Beer Butter, Spicy Cajun Butter, or Key Lime Sunset Butter. (GF)

items.name: Louisiana Gator Tail
items.description: Bite-sized pieces of real gator marinated, lightly-floured and fried, served with our Cajun remoulade.

items.name: Hush Puppies
items.description: Sweet corn meal batter fried up crispy, served with a side of our homemade remoulade sauce or honey.

items.name: Fried Green Tomatoes
items.description: Southern fried in seasoned flour, sprinkled with parmesan and bacon crumbles, served on fresh greens with homemade blue cheese dressing.

items.name: Fresh Jumbo Chicken Wings
items.description: 6 or 12 fresh jumbo wings, naked fried crispy in a dedicated GF fryer, tossed in your choice of signature sauce. Served with celery and house ranch. (GF)

items.name: "Boneless Wings" Chicken Tenders
items.description: Fresh white meat chunks, hand-breaded and fried when you order, tossed in one of our wing sauces. Served with celery and house ranch.

items.name: Raw Oysters on the Half Shell
items.description: Brought in fresh daily from the Gulf states, always hand-shucked when you order. With fresh lemon and cocktail sauce. (GF)

items.name: Fresh Fried Gulf Oysters
items.description: Fresh, never frozen, lightly floured and flash fried when you order, with homemade cocktail sauce.

items.name: Fried Pickle Chips
items.description: An addictive southern treat! Dill chips tossed in seasoned flour, fried crispy, served with ranch dressing.

items.name: Calamari
items.description: Wild-caught, USA harvest squid tubes and tentacles, cut in house, lightly floured and flash fried, with marinara.

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Hand breaded in crunchy crumbs, fried golden brown, served with a side of our homemade ranch.

items.name: Southern Pimento Cheese Spread
items.description: Our own recipe featuring cheddar, pimentos and a touch of onion and jalapeno, served with celery sticks and crusty bread slices.

categories.name: Fresh Salads
categories.description: Homemade dressings: Ranch, Blue Cheese, Honey Mustard, Creamy Caesar, Herb Vinaigrette

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Fresh chopped romaine, tomato wedges, red onion slices, shredded carrots, sliced cucumbers, and croutons. (GF without croutons)

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Fresh chopped romaine tossed with shredded parmesan, croutons and creamy Caesar dressing, served with bakery garlic bread.

items.name: Everglades Salad
items.description: Homemade Cajun-spiced pecans, bacon crumbles, tomato wedges, sweet red onion, hearts of palm, and blue cheese on fresh romaine. (GF)

items.name: Southern Salad
items.description: Sweet Florida strawberries and Georgia pecans over fresh romaine, with palm hearts, red onion, croutons, and goat cheese crumbles. (GF)

categories.name: From Scratch Soups
categories.description: Made fresh daily — add a side salad for $4.00

items.name: Southern Style Chowder
items.description: Atlantic clams simmered in real cream and butter, with sweet corn, onions, bell peppers, potatoes, and bacon.

items.name: Salty Papa's Original Gumbo
items.description: Andouille sausage and fresh chicken, with celery, onions, and green peppers in our spicy tomato stock thickened with filé and brown roux, topped with turmeric rice.

categories.name: Po' Boys & Sandwiches
categories.description: All selections include your choice of 2 side orders

items.name: Black Angus Steak Burger
items.description: A thick 1/2 pound of fresh beef, grilled to order on bakery brioche bun with lettuce, tomato, pickles, red onion. (GF without bun)

items.name: Bayou Burger
items.description: Our 1/2 pound steak burger topped with homemade pimento cheese, fresh jalapenos, bacon, and hand-breaded onion rings.

items.name: Chicken Sammy
items.description: Fresh, all-natural, boneless breast on brioche with lettuce, tomato, onion. Grilled (GF), Blackened (GF), Southern Fried, or Buffalo.

items.name: Atlantic Cod Sandwich
items.description: Mild, flaky whitefish lightly fried in crispy crumbs on bakery brioche roll with lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, and homemade tartar sauce.

items.name: Jumbo Shrimp Po' Boy
items.description: Fresh bakery long roll with crispy-fried Gulf shrimp, fully dressed with chopped lettuce, tomato and homemade Cajun remoulade.

items.name: Chicken Breast Po' Boy
items.description: Fresh bakery long roll with crispy-fried chicken breast, fully dressed with chopped lettuce, tomato and homemade Cajun remoulade.

items.name: Gulf Oyster Po' Boy
items.description: Fresh bakery long roll with crispy-fried Gulf oysters, fully dressed with chopped lettuce, tomato and homemade Cajun remoulade.

items.name: Clam Strip Po' Boy
items.description: Fresh bakery long roll with crispy-fried clam strips, fully dressed with chopped lettuce, tomato and homemade Cajun remoulade.

categories.name: Chicken & Beef Entrees
categories.description: All choices include 2 side orders (unless noted)

items.name: Southern Fried Chicken & Gravy
items.description: Fresh, boneless breast dredged in seasoned flour, fried golden brown, smothered with from-scratch andouille sausage white gravy.

items.name: Key West Chicken Bowl
items.description: Turmeric rice and black beans, topped with chicken breast sautéed in garlic-shallot butter, garnished with grilled corn relish, fresh tomatoes, red peppers, and green onions. Served with garlic bread. (GF)

items.name: Coconut Fried Chicken
items.description: Fresh chicken breast floured and crusted with coconut shreds, fried golden brown, served with homemade piña colada sauce.

items.name: Chicken & Waffles
items.description: Southern fried chicken breast stacked with fluffy waffles, topped with sweet potato fries and served with maple syrup.

items.name: Charleston Chicken & Grits
items.description: Creamy cheddar cheese grits topped with sautéed chicken, spicy andouille sausage, white wine, peppers, and our signature Low Country seasonings. Regular or Extra Spicy Ghost Pepper. (GF)

items.name: Cast Iron Chicken
items.description: Fresh chicken breast sliced and sautéed in real butter with fresh tomatoes, shallots, garlic, and herbs, finished with white wine, served over rice or linguine with garlic bread. (GF over rice)

items.name: Petite Filet Mignons
items.description: Eight ounces of choice tenderloin beef, brushed with garlic butter and grilled to order. (GF)

items.name: Steak & Shrimp Grill
items.description: Our tender petite filets with a skewer of large shrimp added on the grill. (GF)

categories.name: Signature Shrimp Dishes
categories.description: Proudly serving genuine USA "Pink Gold" wild-caught Gulf shrimp, never imported. All 1/2lb entrees include 2 side orders.

items.name: Papa's Famous Shrimp & Grits
items.description: A big bowl of creamy cheddar cheese grits topped with sautéed pink Gulf shrimp, spicy andouille sausage, white wine, peppers, and our signature Low Country seasonings with garlic bread. Regular or Extra Spicy Ghost Pepper. (GF)

items.name: Bacon Wrapped Shrimp
items.description: Two skewers of large sweet pink shrimp wrapped in slices of hickory smoked bacon, brushed with sweet barbeque sauce. (GF)

items.name: Coconut Fried Shrimp
items.description: Large Gulf shrimp lightly floured and coated with shredded natural coconut then fried golden brown, with homemade piña colada dipping sauce.

items.name: City Creole Jambalaya
items.description: Gulf shrimp, andouille sausage and chicken breast in a rich, spicy tomato stew with celery, peppers, onions, thickened with dark roux, topped with rice and garlic bread. Regular or Extra Spicy Ghost Pepper.

items.name: Fried Shrimp
items.description: The classic featuring the highest quality "pink gold" shrimp tossed in crispy crunchy bread crumbs and fried to a golden brown, served with homemade cocktail sauce.

items.name: Naked Shrimp
items.description: The famous taste of authentic Gulf pink shrimp, simply served with our homemade garlic butter. Your choice of grilled or sautéed. (GF)

items.name: Mango & Sweet Chili Grilled Shrimp
items.description: Gulf shrimp skewers grilled and basted with a sweet chili sauce and real mango chunks. (GF)

items.name: Key West Shrimp Bowl
items.description: Black beans, rice, corn relish with fresh tomatoes and onions, topped with Gulf shrimp sautéed in butter and fresh lime juice, with garlic bread. (GF)

items.name: Cast Iron Shrimp
items.description: Gulf shrimp lightly sautéed in real butter with fresh tomatoes, shallots, garlic and herbs, finished with white wine, served over rice or linguine with garlic bread. (GF over rice)

categories.name: Fresh Shellfish
categories.description: All entrees include your choice of 2 side orders

items.name: Gulf Oysters
items.description: A half pound of large, plump "select" oysters brought in fresh daily from the Gulf states, never frozen, lightly dredged in seasoned flour and flash fried.

items.name: Atlantic Sea Scallops
items.description: A generous portion of fresh, large, sweet sea scallops. Grilled (GF), Blackened (GF), Pan-Seared, or Fried.

items.name: Clams
items.description: Fresh Atlantic clam strips tossed in a light dusting of seasoned flour, then flash fried so they're crispy but tender.

items.name: Fried Combo Platter
items.description: Choice of two selections of shrimp, cod, oysters, or clams hand-breaded when ordered and fried golden brown. Served with homemade tartar and cocktail sauces.

items.name: Snow Crab Legs
items.description: Full pound of Alaskan/Canadian snow crab with drawn butter and lemon wedges. (GF)

items.name: Atlantic Cod "Fish & Chips"
items.description: A half pound of mild, flaky whitefish, cut in planks and tossed in crispy breadcrumbs then lightly fried, served with fries, coleslaw and tartar.

items.name: Fresh Catches of the Day
items.description: Real Florida favorites such as Hogfish and Black Grouper, spear and line caught from Key West to the deep Gulf. Grilled (GF), Blackened (GF), Sautéed (GF), Broiled (GF), or Fried.

items.name: Nawlins Style
items.description: Your choice of Gulf fish blackened New Orleans style, topped with our homemade creamy Cajun pepper sauce.

items.name: Creamy Coleslaw
items.description: Fresh cabbage with homemade sweet dressing. (GF)

items.name: Hand-Cut Fries
items.description: Fresh cut daily, fried in a dedicated fryer. (GF)

items.name: Baked Beans
items.description: Brown sugar, onions and bacon. (GF)

items.name: Cheesy Grits
items.description: House recipe with butter and cheddar. (GF)

items.name: Garlic Bread
items.description: Bakery ciabatta toasted with our recipe butter.

items.name: Fresh Vegetable
items.description: Sautéed in our real garlic butter. (GF)

items.name: Hush Puppies
items.description: Golden brown fried cornmeal balls.

items.name: Black Beans & Rice
items.description: Our turmeric rice with seasoned beans. (GF)

items.name: Sweet Potato Fries
items.description: Sweet and crispy, dedicated fryer. (GF)

items.name: Mashed Potatoes
items.description: With real cream and butter (available 4pm). (GF)

categories.name: Kids' Meals
categories.description: 12 & Under — a smaller portion plus choice of one side order

items.name: Pink Gulf Shrimp
items.description: Grilled (GF) or crunchy fried.

items.name: Fresh Chicken Tenders
items.description: Grilled (GF) or crunchy fried.

items.name: Atlantic Cod
items.description: Mild whitefish plank, crunchy fried.

items.name: Pasta Bowl
items.description: Linguine topped with marinara and parmesan.

items.name: Hot Dog
items.description: Natural, uncured pure beef dog on toasted roll.

categories.name: Desserts & Ice Cream
categories.description: Homemade sweets to finish your meal

items.name: Florida Key Lime Pie
items.description: Big slice of our homemade pie with real Key West lime juice and heavy cream in a graham cracker crust, with fresh Florida strawberry drizzle and whipped cream.

items.name: Mud Puppy
items.description: Homemade peanut butter and cream cheese mousse with dark chocolate ganache fudge, served atop a gluten-free brownie with whipped cream and peanut butter cup crumbles. (GF)

items.name: Love Boat Ice Cream
items.description: Four scoops of our favorite ice cream made locally in Fort Myers, topped with whipped cream. Flavors change daily.

items.name: Bottomless Soft Drinks & Tea
items.description: Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, Root Beer, Mr. Pibb, Iced Tea, Sweet Tea, Coffee.

items.name: Frozen Fruit Smoothies
items.description: All natural fruit purees frozen and topped with whipped cream and fruit. Piña Colada, Banana, Strawberry, or Mango.

items.name: Domestic Draft Beer
items.description: Yuengling, Miller Lite, Michelob Ultra. Pints or Pitchers.

items.name: Craft Draft Beer
items.description: Three craft choices daily — ask your server!

items.name: Sangrias by the Pint
items.description: House wine, muddled fruit, sparkling water, juices and fruit cordials. White Peach Pinot or Cabernet Red Berry.

items.name: House Wine by the Glass
items.description: Pinot Grigio, Chardonnay, White Zinfandel, Cabernet, Merlot.

categories.name: Papa's Signature Drinks
categories.description: Premium cocktails made with care — $9.99 each

items.name: The Salty Papa Margarita
items.description: Premium tequila and orange liqueur blended with real lime, lemon and orange juices. On the rocks or frozen. Traditional, Strawberry, or Mango.

items.name: Kentucky Wildcat
items.description: Premium Kentucky bourbon paired with Ale-8 ginger ale, with fresh lime juice.

items.name: Snowbirds Frozen Rum Drinks
items.description: All natural fruit purees, flavored rums, topped with a dark rum float, whipped cream and fruit. Piña Colada, Banana, Strawberry, or Mango.

items.name: Sanibel Key Lime Pie Martini
items.description: Spiced rum and orange liqueur with lime juice and sweet cream. A favorite Florida dessert in a glass!

items.name: Bayside Bloody Mary
items.description: Your choice of premium vodka mixed with our homemade bloody Mary mix.

items.name: Blue Mermaid
items.description: Coconut rum and blue curaçao with coconut cream and pineapple juice, topped by fruit and dark rum float. Frozen or on the rocks.

items.name: Dirty Arnold Palmer
items.description: Sweet tea vodka and lemonade, served frosty cold over ice with fresh lemon wedges.

items.name: Southern Storm
items.description: Dark rum, Ale-8 ginger, lime, and a splash of sugar cane syrup.

items.name: Bliss on the Beach
items.description: Premium vodka, peach schnapps, orange and cranberry juices on the rocks.

items.name: Gator Bayou Water
items.description: Green melon and orange liqueurs, vodka and splashes of lemon and Sprite.

items.name: Palm Tree Punch
items.description: Light and dark rums with orgeat and orange liqueur, lime and simple syrup. The perfect classic island drink!

categories.name: Papa's Pupper Meals
categories.description: Served on the patio for well-behaved, leashed furry friends — all pups get fresh ice water!

items.name: Small Pupper
items.description: Ground beef or cubed chicken breast sautéed with fresh vegetables or rice.

items.name: Large Doggo
items.description: Ground beef or cubed chicken breast sautéed with fresh vegetables or rice.

items.name: Puppuccino
items.description: Treat cup of whipped cream.
